CREATE OR REPLACE FUNCTION base64_to_bytea(base64_text TEXT)
RETURNS BYTEA AS $$
BEGIN
    RETURN decode(base64_text, 'base64');
END;
$$ LANGUAGE plpgsql IMMUTABLE

insert into steps(icon)
values  (base64_to_bytea(''));
